# MCP Toolbox for Databases - Documentation Index
> MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open source MCP server for databases. It enables you to develop tools easier, faster, and more securely by handling the complexities such as connection pooling, authentication, and more.

**DOCUMENTATION VERSION:** Dev
**BASE URL:** https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/
**GENERATED ON:** 2026-03-08T23:51:14Z

---
### 🤖 System Directives for AI Models
**Role:** You are an expert Developer Advocate and Integration Engineer for the **MCP (Model Context Protocol) Toolbox for Databases**.
**Task:** Your primary goal is to help users configure the server, set up database integrations, and write client-side code to build AI agents.
**Strict Guidelines:**
1. **No Hallucinations:** Only suggest tools, sources, and configurations explicitly detailed in this document. Do not invent arbitrary REST endpoints.
2. **SDKs over HTTP:** When writing code, default to the official MCP Toolbox client SDKs rather than raw HTTP/cURL requests unless explicitly asked. Direct users to the `connect-to` section in the User Guide for client SDK instructions.
3. **Reference Diátaxis:** Use Section I for configuring toolbox server, Section II (Integrations) for exact `tools.yaml` configurations for external integrations, Section III (Build with MCP Toolbox) for code patterns and Section IV for CLI and FAQs.

### 📖 Glossary
To prevent context collapse, adhere to these strict definitions within the MCP ecosystem:
* **MCP Toolbox:** The central server/service that standardizes AI access to databases and external APIs.
* **Source:** A configured backend connection to an external system (e.g., PostgreSQL, BigQuery, HTTP).
* **Tool:** A single, atomic capability exposed to the LLM (e.g., `bigquery-sql-query`), executed against a Source.
* **Toolset:** A logical, grouped collection of Tools.
* **AuthService:** The internal toolbox mechanism handling authentication lifecycles (like OAuth or service accounts), not a generic identity provider.
* **Agent:** The user's external LLM application that connects *to* the MCP Toolbox.

### ⚙️ Global Environment & Prerequisites
* **Configuration:** `tools.yaml` is the ultimate source of truth for server configuration.
* **Database:** PostgreSQL 16+ and the `psql` client.
* **Language Requirements:**

### The Diátaxis Narrative Framework
This documentation is structured following the Diátaxis framework to assist in clear navigation and understanding:
* **Section I: User Guide:** (Explanation) Theoretical context, high-level understanding, and universal How-To Guides.
* **Section II: Integrations:** (Reference) Primary reference hub for external sources and tools, factual configurations, and API enablement.
* **Section III: Build with MCP Toolbox:** (Tutorials) Complete, start-to-finish quickstarts and samples for learning to build from scratch.
* **Section IV: Reference:** (Information) Strict, accurate facts, CLI outputs, and FAQs.
---

## Documentation Map


- [Getting Started](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/getting-started/): How to get started with Toolbox.


  - [Introduction](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/getting-started/introduction/): An introduction to MCP Toolbox for Databases.


  - [Python Quickstart (Local)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/getting-started/local_quickstart/): How to get started running MCP Toolbox locally with [Python](https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox-sdk-python), PostgreSQL, and  [Agent Development Kit](https://google.github.io/adk-docs/), [LangGraph](https://www.langchain.com/langgraph), [LlamaIndex](https://www.llamaindex.ai/) or [GoogleGenAI](https://pypi.org/project/google-genai/).


  - [JS Quickstart (Local)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/getting-started/local_quickstart_js/): How to get started running MCP Toolbox locally with [JavaScript](https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox-sdk-js), PostgreSQL, and orchestration frameworks such as [LangChain](https://js.langchain.com/docs/introduction/), [GenkitJS](https://genkit.dev/docs/get-started/),  [LlamaIndex](https://ts.llamaindex.ai/) and [GoogleGenAI](https://github.com/googleapis/js-genai).


  - [Go Quickstart (Local)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/getting-started/local_quickstart_go/): How to get started running MCP Toolbox locally with [Go](https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox-sdk-go), PostgreSQL, and orchestration frameworks such as [LangChain Go](https://tmc.github.io/langchaingo/docs/), [GenkitGo](https://genkit.dev/go/docs/get-started-go/), [Go GenAI](https://github.com/googleapis/go-genai) and [OpenAI Go](https://github.com/openai/openai-go).


  - [Prompts using Gemini CLI](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/getting-started/prompts_quickstart_gemini_cli/): How to get started using Toolbox prompts locally with PostgreSQL and [Gemini CLI](https://pypi.org/project/gemini-cli/).


  - [Quickstart (MCP)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/getting-started/mcp_quickstart/): How to get started running Toolbox locally with MCP Inspector.


  - [Configuration](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/getting-started/configure/): How to configure Toolbox's tools.yaml file.

- [Concepts](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/concepts/): Some core concepts in Toolbox


  - [Telemetry](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/concepts/telemetry/): An overview of telemetry and observability in Toolbox.

- [Featured Articles](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/blogs/): Toolbox Medium Blogs
- [How-to](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/): List of guides detailing how to do different things with Toolbox. 


  - [Connect from your IDE](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/): List of guides detailing how to connect your AI tools (IDEs) to Toolbox using MCP.


    - [AlloyDB Admin API using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/alloydb_pg_admin_mcp/): Create your AlloyDB database with MCP Toolbox.


    - [AlloyDB using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/alloydb_pg_mcp/): Connect your IDE to AlloyDB using Toolbox.


    - [BigQuery using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/bigquery_mcp/): Connect your IDE to BigQuery using Toolbox.


    - [Cloud SQL for MySQL using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/cloud_sql_mysql_mcp/): Connect your IDE to Cloud SQL for MySQL using Toolbox.


    - [Cloud SQL for Postgres using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/cloud_sql_pg_mcp/): Connect your IDE to Cloud SQL for Postgres using Toolbox.


    - [Cloud SQL for SQL Server using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/cloud_sql_mssql_mcp/): Connect your IDE to Cloud SQL for SQL Server using Toolbox.


    - [Firestore using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/firestore_mcp/): Connect your IDE to Firestore using Toolbox.


    - [Looker using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/looker_mcp/): Connect your IDE to Looker using Toolbox.


    - [MySQL using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/mysql_mcp/): Connect your IDE to MySQL using Toolbox.

    - [Neo4j using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/neo4j_mcp/): Connect your IDE to Neo4j using Toolbox.

    - [PostgreSQL using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/postgres_mcp/): Connect your IDE to PostgreSQL using Toolbox.


    - [Spanner using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/spanner_mcp/): Connect your IDE to Spanner using Toolbox.


    - [SQL Server using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/mssql_mcp/): Connect your IDE to SQL Server using Toolbox.

    - [SQLite using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/sqlite_mcp/): Connect your IDE to SQLite using Toolbox.

    - [Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL Admin using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/cloud_sql_pg_admin_mcp/): Create and manage Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL (Admin) using Toolbox.


    - [Cloud SQL for MySQL Admin using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/cloud_sql_mysql_admin_mcp/): Create and manage Cloud SQL for MySQL (Admin) using Toolbox.


    - [Cloud SQL for SQL Server Admin using MCP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect-ide/cloud_sql_mssql_admin_mcp/): Create and manage Cloud SQL for SQL Server (Admin) using Toolbox.


  - [Connect via MCP Client](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect_via_mcp/): How to connect to Toolbox from a MCP Client.


  - [Toolbox UI](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/toolbox-ui/): How to effectively use Toolbox UI.


  - [Connect via Gemini CLI Extensions](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/connect_via_geminicli/): Connect to Toolbox via Gemini CLI Extensions.

  - [Deploy to Cloud Run](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/deploy_toolbox/): How to set up and configure Toolbox to run on Cloud Run.


  - [Deploy ADK Agent and MCP Toolbox](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/deploy_adk_agent/): How to deploy your ADK Agent to Vertex AI Agent Engine and connect it to an MCP Toolbox deployed on Cloud Run.


  - [Deploy to Kubernetes](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/deploy_gke/): How to set up and configure Toolbox to deploy on Kubernetes with Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE).


  - [Deploy using Docker Compose](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/deploy_docker/): How to deploy Toolbox using Docker Compose.


  - [Export Telemetry](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/export_telemetry/): How to set up and configure Toolbox to use the Otel Collector.


  - [Generate Agent Skills](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/generate_skill/): How to generate agent skills from a toolset.


  - [Invoke Tools via CLI](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/how-to/invoke_tool/): Learn how to invoke your tools directly from the command line using the `invoke` command.

- [Resources](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/): List of reference documentation for resources in Toolbox.


  - [AuthServices](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/authservices/): AuthServices represent services that handle authentication and authorization.


    - [Google Sign-In](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/authservices/google/): Use Google Sign-In for Oauth 2.0 flow and token lifecycle.


  - [Sources](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/): Sources represent your different data sources that a tool can interact with.


    - [AlloyDB for PostgreSQL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/alloydb-pg/): AlloyDB for PostgreSQL is a fully-managed, PostgreSQL-compatible database for demanding transactional workloads.


    - [AlloyDB Admin](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/alloydb-admin/): The "alloydb-admin" source provides a client for the AlloyDB API.


    - [BigQuery](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/bigquery/): BigQuery is Google Cloud's fully managed, petabyte-scale, and cost-effective analytics data warehouse that lets you run analytics over vast amounts of  data in near real time. With BigQuery, there's no infrastructure to set  up or manage, letting you focus on finding meaningful insights using  GoogleSQL and taking advantage of flexible pricing models across on-demand  and flat-rate options.


    - [Bigtable](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/bigtable/): Bigtable is a low-latency NoSQL database service for machine learning, operational analytics, and user-facing operations. It's a wide-column, key-value store that can scale to billions of rows and thousands of columns. With Bigtable, you can replicate your data to regions across the world for high availability and data resiliency.


    - [Cassandra](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cassandra/): Apache Cassandra is a NoSQL distributed database known for its horizontal scalability, distributed architecture, and flexible schema definition.


    - [ClickHouse](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/clickhouse/): ClickHouse is an open-source, OLTP database.


    - [Cloud Healthcare API](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cloud-healthcare/): The Cloud Healthcare API provides a managed solution for storing and accessing healthcare data in Google Cloud, providing a critical bridge  between existing care systems and applications hosted on Google Cloud.


    - [Cloud Logging Admin](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cloud-logging-admin/): The Cloud Logging Admin source enables tools to interact with the Cloud Logging API, allowing for the retrieval of log names, monitored resource types, and the querying of log data.


    - [Cloud Monitoring](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cloud-monitoring/): A "cloud-monitoring" source provides a client for the Cloud Monitoring API.


    - [Cloud SQL for MySQL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cloud-sql-mysql/): Cloud SQL for MySQL is a fully-managed database service for MySQL.


    - [Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cloud-sql-pg/): Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL is a fully-managed database service for Postgres.


    - [Cloud SQL for SQL Server](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cloud-sql-mssql/): Cloud SQL for SQL Server is a fully-managed database service for SQL Server.


    - [Cloud SQL Admin](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cloud-sql-admin/): A "cloud-sql-admin" source provides a client for the Cloud SQL Admin API.


    - [CockroachDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cockroachdb/): CockroachDB is a distributed SQL database built for cloud applications.


    - [Couchbase](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/couchbase/): A "couchbase" source connects to a Couchbase database.


    - [Dataplex](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/dataplex/): Dataplex Universal Catalog is a unified, intelligent governance solution for data and AI assets in Google Cloud. Dataplex Universal Catalog powers AI, analytics, and business intelligence at scale.


    - [Dataproc Clusters](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/dataproc/): Google Cloud Dataproc Clusters lets you provision and manage Apache Spark and Hadoop clusters.


    - [Dgraph](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/dgraph/): Dgraph is fully open-source, built-for-scale graph database for Gen AI workloads


    - [Elasticsearch](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/elasticsearch/): Elasticsearch is a distributed, free and open search and analytics engine  for all types of data, including textual, numerical, geospatial, structured,  and unstructured.


    - [Firebird](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/firebird/): Firebird is a powerful, cross-platform, and open-source relational database.


    - [Firestore](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/firestore/): Firestore is a NoSQL document database built for automatic scaling, high performance, and ease of application development. It's a fully managed, serverless database that supports mobile, web, and server development.


    - [Gemini Data Analytics](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/cloud-gda/): A "cloud-gemini-data-analytics" source provides a client for the Gemini Data Analytics API.


    - [HTTP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/http/): The HTTP source enables the Toolbox to retrieve data from a remote server using HTTP requests.


    - [Looker](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/looker/): Looker is a business intelligence tool that also provides a semantic layer.


    - [MariaDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/mariadb/): MariaDB is an open-source relational database compatible with MySQL.


    - [MindsDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/mindsdb/): MindsDB is an AI federated database that enables SQL queries across hundreds of datasources and ML models.


    - [MongoDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/mongodb/): MongoDB is a no-sql data platform that can not only serve general purpose data requirements also perform VectorSearch where both operational data and embeddings used of search can reside in same document.


    - [MySQL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/mysql/): MySQL is a relational database management system that stores and manages data.


    - [Neo4j](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/neo4j/): Neo4j is a powerful, open source graph database system


    - [OceanBase](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/oceanbase/): OceanBase is a distributed relational database that provides high availability, scalability, and compatibility with MySQL.


    - [Oracle](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/oracle/): Oracle Database is a widely-used relational database management system.


    - [PostgreSQL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/postgres/): PostgreSQL is a powerful, open source object-relational database.


    - [Redis](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/redis/): Redis is a in-memory data structure store.


    - [Serverless for Apache Spark](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/serverless-spark/): Google Cloud Serverless for Apache Spark lets you run Spark workloads without requiring you to provision and manage your own Spark cluster.


    - [SingleStore](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/singlestore/): SingleStore is the cloud-native database built with speed and scale to power data-intensive applications.


    - [Snowflake](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/snowflake/): Snowflake is a cloud-based data platform.


    - [Spanner](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/spanner/): Spanner is a fully managed database service from Google Cloud that combines  relational, key-value, graph, and search capabilities.


    - [SQL Server](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/mssql/): SQL Server is a relational database management system (RDBMS).


    - [SQLite](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/sqlite/): SQLite is a C-language library that implements a small, fast, self-contained,  high-reliability, full-featured, SQL database engine.


    - [TiDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/tidb/): TiDB is a distributed SQL database that combines the best of traditional RDBMS and NoSQL databases.


    - [Trino](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/trino/): Trino is a distributed SQL query engine for big data analytics.


    - [Valkey](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/valkey/): Valkey is an open-source, in-memory data structure store, forked from Redis.


    - [YugabyteDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/sources/yugabytedb/): YugabyteDB is a high-performance, distributed SQL database. 


  - [EmbeddingModels](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/embeddingmodels/): EmbeddingModels represent services that transform text into vector embeddings for semantic search.


    - [Gemini Embedding](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/embeddingmodels/gemini/): Use Google's Gemini models to generate high-performance text embeddings for vector databases.


  - [Tools](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/): Tools define actions an agent can take -- such as reading and writing to a source.


    - [AlloyDB AI NL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydbainl/): AlloyDB AI NL Tool.


      - [alloydb-ai-nl](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydbainl/alloydb-ai-nl/): The "alloydb-ai-nl" tool leverages [AlloyDB AI](https://cloud.google.com/alloydb/ai) next-generation Natural Language support to provide the ability to query the database directly using natural language.


    - [AlloyDB for PostgreSQL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/): Tools for AlloyDB for PostgreSQL.


      - [alloydb-create-cluster](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-create-cluster/): The "alloydb-create-cluster" tool creates a new AlloyDB for PostgreSQL cluster in a specified project and location.


      - [alloydb-create-instance](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-create-instance/): The "alloydb-create-instance" tool creates a new AlloyDB instance within a specified cluster.


      - [alloydb-get-cluster](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-get-cluster/): The "alloydb-get-cluster" tool retrieves details for a specific AlloyDB cluster.


      - [alloydb-get-instance](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-get-instance/): The "alloydb-get-instance" tool retrieves details for a specific AlloyDB instance.


      - [alloydb-get-user](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-get-user/): The "alloydb-get-user" tool retrieves details for a specific AlloyDB user.


      - [alloydb-list-clusters](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-list-clusters/): The "alloydb-list-clusters" tool lists the AlloyDB clusters in a given project and location.


      - [alloydb-list-instances](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-list-instances/): The "alloydb-list-instances" tool lists the AlloyDB instances for a given project, cluster and location.


      - [alloydb-list-users](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-list-users/): The "alloydb-list-users" tool lists all database users within an AlloyDB cluster.


      - [alloydb-create-user](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-create-user/): The "alloydb-create-user" tool creates a new database user within a specified AlloyDB cluster.


      - [alloydb-wait-for-operation](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/alloydb/alloydb-wait-for-operation/): Wait for a long-running AlloyDB operation to complete.


    - [BigQuery](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/): Tools that work with BigQuery Sources.


      - [bigquery-analyze-contribution](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-analyze-contribution/): A "bigquery-analyze-contribution" tool performs contribution analysis in BigQuery.


      - [bigquery-conversational-analytics](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-conversational-analytics/): A "bigquery-conversational-analytics" tool allows conversational interaction with a BigQuery source.


      - [bigquery-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-execute-sql/): A "bigquery-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against BigQuery.


      - [bigquery-forecast](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-forecast/): A "bigquery-forecast" tool forecasts time series data in BigQuery.


      - [bigquery-get-dataset-info](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-get-dataset-info/): A "bigquery-get-dataset-info" tool retrieves metadata for a BigQuery dataset.


      - [bigquery-get-table-info](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-get-table-info/): A "bigquery-get-table-info" tool retrieves metadata for a BigQuery table.


      - [bigquery-list-dataset-ids](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-list-dataset-ids/): A "bigquery-list-dataset-ids" tool returns all dataset IDs from the source.


      - [bigquery-list-table-ids](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-list-table-ids/): A "bigquery-list-table-ids" tool returns table IDs in a given BigQuery dataset.


      - [bigquery-search-catalog](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-search-catalog/): A "bigquery-search-catalog" tool allows to search for entries based on the provided query.


      - [bigquery-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigquery/bigquery-sql/): A "bigquery-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement.


    - [Bigtable](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigtable/): Tools that work with Bigtable Sources.


      - [bigtable-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/bigtable/bigtable-sql/): A "bigtable-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a Google Cloud Bigtable instance.


    - [Cassandra](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cassandra/): Tools that work with Cassandra Sources.


      - [cassandra-cql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cassandra/cassandra-cql/): A "cassandra-cql" tool executes a pre-defined CQL statement against a Cassandra database.


    - [ClickHouse](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/clickhouse/): Tools for interacting with ClickHouse databases and tables.


      - [clickhouse-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/clickhouse/clickhouse-execute-sql/): A "clickhouse-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a ClickHouse database.


      - [clickhouse-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/clickhouse/clickhouse-sql/): A "clickhouse-sql" tool executes SQL queries as prepared statements in ClickHouse.


      - [clickhouse-list-databases](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/clickhouse/clickhouse-list-databases/): A "clickhouse-list-databases" tool lists all databases in a ClickHouse instance.


      - [clickhouse-list-tables](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/clickhouse/clickhouse-list-tables/): A "clickhouse-list-tables" tool lists all tables in a specific ClickHouse database.


    - [Cloud Healthcare API](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/): Tools that work with Cloud Healthcare Sources.


      - [cloud-healthcare-fhir-fetch-page](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-fhir-fetch-page/): A "cloud-healthcare-fhir-fetch-page" tool fetches a page of FHIR resources from a given URL.


      - [cloud-healthcare-fhir-patient-everything](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-fhir-patient-everything/): A "cloud-healthcare-fhir-patient-everything" tool retrieves all information for a given patient.


      - [cloud-healthcare-fhir-patient-search](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-fhir-patient-search/): A "cloud-healthcare-fhir-patient-search" tool searches for patients in a FHIR store.


      - [cloud-healthcare-get-dataset](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-get-dataset/): A "cloud-healthcare-get-dataset" tool retrieves metadata for the Healthcare dataset in the source.


      - [cloud-healthcare-get-dicom-store](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-get-dicom-store/): A "cloud-healthcare-get-dicom-store" tool retrieves information about a DICOM store.


      - [cloud-healthcare-get-dicom-store-metrics](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-get-dicom-store-metrics/): A "cloud-healthcare-get-dicom-store-metrics" tool retrieves metrics for a DICOM store.


      - [cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-resource](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-resource/): A "cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-resource" tool retrieves a specific FHIR resource.


      - [cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-store](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-store/): A "cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-store" tool retrieves information about a FHIR store.


      - [cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-store-metrics](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-store-metrics/): A "cloud-healthcare-get-fhir-store-metrics" tool retrieves metrics for a FHIR store.


      - [cloud-healthcare-list-dicom-stores](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-list-dicom-stores/): A "cloud-healthcare-list-dicom-stores" lists the available DICOM stores in the healthcare dataset.


      - [cloud-healthcare-list-fhir-stores](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-list-fhir-stores/): A "cloud-healthcare-list-fhir-stores" lists the available FHIR stores in the healthcare dataset.


      - [cloud-healthcare-retrieve-rendered-dicom-instance](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-retrieve-rendered-dicom-instance/): A "cloud-healthcare-retrieve-rendered-dicom-instance" tool retrieves a rendered DICOM instance from a DICOM store.


      - [cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-instances](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-instances/): A "cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-instances" tool searches for DICOM instances in a DICOM store.


      - [cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-series](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-series/): A "cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-series" tool searches for DICOM series in a DICOM store.


      - [cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-studies](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudhealthcare/cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-studies/): A "cloud-healthcare-search-dicom-studies" tool searches for DICOM studies in a DICOM store.


    - [Cloud Logging Admin](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudloggingadmin/): Tools that work with Cloud Logging Admin Sources.


      - [cloud-logging-admin-list-log-names](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudloggingadmin/cloud-logging-admin-list-log-names/): A "cloud-logging-admin-list-log-names" tool lists the log names in the project.


      - [cloud-logging-admin-list-resource-types](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudloggingadmin/cloud-logging-admin-list-resource-types/): A "cloud-logging-admin-list-resource-types" tool lists the monitored resource types.


      - [cloud-logging-admin-query-logs](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudloggingadmin/cloud-logging-admin-query-logs/): A "cloud-logging-admin-query-logs" tool queries log entries.


    - [Cloud Monitoring](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudmonitoring/): Tools that work with Cloud Monitoring source.


      - [cloud-monitoring-query-prometheus](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudmonitoring/cloud-monitoring-query-prometheus/): The "cloud-monitoring-query-prometheus" tool fetches time series metrics for a project using a given prometheus query.

    - [Cloud SQL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/): Tools that work with Cloud SQL. 


      - [Cloud SQL List Instances](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqllistinstances/): List Cloud SQL instances in a project.


      - [cloud-sql-list-databases](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqllistdatabases/): List Cloud SQL databases in an instance.

      - [cloud-sql-mysql-create-instance](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlmysqlcreateinstance/): Create a Cloud SQL for MySQL instance.

      - [cloud-sql-clone-instance](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlcloneinstance/): Clone a Cloud SQL instance.

      - [cloud-sql-create-backup](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlcreatebackup/): Creates a backup on a Cloud SQL instance.

      - [cloud-sql-create-database](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlcreatedatabase/): Create a new database in a Cloud SQL instance.


      - [cloud-sql-create-users](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlcreateusers/): Create a new user in a Cloud SQL instance.


      - [cloud-sql-get-instance](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlgetinstances/): Get a Cloud SQL instance resource.


      - [cloud-sql-mssql-create-instance](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlmssqlcreateinstance/): Create a Cloud SQL for SQL Server instance.

      - [cloud-sql-postgres-create-instance](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlpgcreateinstances/): Create a Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL instance.

      - [cloud-sql-restore-backup](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlrestorebackup/): Restores a backup of a Cloud SQL instance.

      - [cloud-sql-wait-for-operation](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlwaitforoperation/): Wait for a long-running Cloud SQL operation to complete.


      - [postgres-upgrade-precheck](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudsql/cloudsqlpgupgradeprecheck/): Perform a pre-check for a Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL major version upgrade.

    - [cockroachdb-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cockroachdb/cockroachdb-execute-sql/): Execute ad-hoc SQL statements against a CockroachDB database.


    - [cockroachdb-list-schemas](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cockroachdb/cockroachdb-list-schemas/): List schemas in a CockroachDB database.


    - [cockroachdb-list-tables](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cockroachdb/cockroachdb-list-tables/): List tables in a CockroachDB database with schema details.


    - [cockroachdb-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cockroachdb/cockroachdb-sql/): Execute parameterized SQL queries in CockroachDB.


    - [Couchbase](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/couchbase/): Tools that work with Couchbase Sources.


      - [couchbase-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/couchbase/couchbase-sql/): A "couchbase-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a Couchbase database.


    - [Dataform](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataform/): Tools that work with Dataform.


      - [dataform-compile-local](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataform/dataform-compile-local/): A "dataform-compile-local" tool runs the `dataform compile` CLI command on a local project directory.


    - [Dataplex](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataplex/): Tools that work with Dataplex Sources.


      - [dataplex-lookup-entry](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataplex/dataplex-lookup-entry/): A "dataplex-lookup-entry" tool returns details of a particular entry in Dataplex Catalog.


      - [dataplex-search-aspect-types](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataplex/dataplex-search-aspect-types/): A "dataplex-search-aspect-types" tool allows to to find aspect types relevant to the query.


      - [dataplex-search-entries](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataplex/dataplex-search-entries/): A "dataplex-search-entries" tool allows to search for entries based on the provided query.


    - [Dataproc](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataproc/): Tools that work with Google Cloud Dataproc Sources.


      - [dataproc-get-cluster](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataproc/dataproc-get-cluster/): A "dataproc-get-cluster" tool retrieves a specific Dataproc cluster from the source.


      - [dataproc-get-job](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataproc/dataproc-get-job/): A "dataproc-get-job" tool retrieves a specific Dataproc job from the source.


      - [dataproc-list-clusters](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataproc/dataproc-list-clusters/): A "dataproc-list-clusters" tool returns a list of Dataproc clusters from the source.


      - [dataproc-list-jobs](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dataproc/dataproc-list-jobs/): A "dataproc-list-jobs" tool returns a list of Dataproc jobs from the source.


    - [Dgraph](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dgraph/): Tools that work with Dgraph Sources.


      - [dgraph-dql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/dgraph/dgraph-dql/): A "dgraph-dql" tool executes a pre-defined DQL statement against a Dgraph database.


    - [Elasticsearch](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/elasticsearch/): Tools that work with Elasticsearch Sources.


      - [elasticsearch-esql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-esql/): Execute ES|QL queries.


    - [Firebird](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firebird/): Tools that work with Firebird Sources.


      - [firebird-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firebird/firebird-execute-sql/): A "firebird-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a Firebird database.


      - [firebird-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firebird/firebird-sql/): A "firebird-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a Firebird database.


    - [Firestore](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/): Tools that work with Firestore Sources.


      - [firestore-add-documents](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-add-documents/): A "firestore-add-documents" tool adds document to a given collection path.


      - [firestore-delete-documents](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-delete-documents/): A "firestore-delete-documents" tool deletes multiple documents from Firestore by their paths.


      - [firestore-get-documents](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-get-documents/): A "firestore-get-documents" tool retrieves multiple documents from Firestore by their paths.


      - [firestore-get-rules](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-get-rules/): A "firestore-get-rules" tool retrieves the active Firestore security rules for the current project.


      - [firestore-list-collections](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-list-collections/): A "firestore-list-collections" tool lists collections in Firestore, either at the root level or as subcollections of a document.


      - [firestore-query](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-query/): Query a Firestore collection with parameterizable filters and Firestore native JSON value types


      - [firestore-query-collection](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-query-collection/): A "firestore-query-collection" tool allow to query collections in Firestore.


      - [firestore-update-document](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-update-document/): A "firestore-update-document" tool updates an existing document in Firestore.


      - [firestore-validate-rules](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/firestore/firestore-validate-rules/): A "firestore-validate-rules" tool validates Firestore security rules syntax and semantic correctness without deploying them. It provides detailed error reporting with source positions and code snippets.


    - [Gemini Data Analytics](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudgda/): Tools for Gemini Data Analytics.


      - [Gemini Data Analytics QueryData](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/cloudgda/cloud-gda-query/): A tool to convert natural language queries into SQL statements using the Gemini Data Analytics QueryData API.


    - [HTTP](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/http/): Tools that work with HTTP Sources.


      - [http](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/http/http/): A "http" tool sends out an HTTP request to an HTTP endpoint.


    - [Looker](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/): Tools that work with Looker Sources.


      - [looker-add-dashboard-element](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-add-dashboard-element/): "looker-add-dashboard-element" creates a dashboard element in the given dashboard.


      - [looker-add-dashboard-filter](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-add-dashboard-filter/): The "looker-add-dashboard-filter" tool adds a filter to a specified dashboard.


      - [looker-conversational-analytics](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-conversational-analytics/): The "looker-conversational-analytics" tool will use the Conversational Analaytics API to analyze data from Looker


      - [looker-create-project-directory](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-create-project-directory/): A "looker-create-project-directory" tool creates a new directory in a LookML project.


      - [looker-create-project-file](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-create-project-file/): A "looker-create-project-file" tool creates a new LookML file in a project.


      - [looker-create-view-from-table](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-create-view-from-table/): This tool generates boilerplate LookML views directly from the database schema.


      - [looker-delete-project-directory](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-delete-project-directory/): A "looker-delete-project-directory" tool deletes a directory from a LookML project.


      - [looker-delete-project-file](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-delete-project-file/): A "looker-delete-project-file" tool deletes a LookML file in a project.


      - [looker-dev-mode](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-dev-mode/): A "looker-dev-mode" tool changes the current session into and out of dev mode


      - [looker-generate-embed-url](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-generate-embed-url/): "looker-generate-embed-url" generates an embeddable URL for Looker content.


      - [looker-get-connection-databases](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-connection-databases/): A "looker-get-connection-databases" tool returns all the databases in a connection.


      - [looker-get-connection-schemas](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-connection-schemas/): A "looker-get-connection-schemas" tool returns all the schemas in a connection.


      - [looker-get-connection-table-columns](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-connection-table-columns/): A "looker-get-connection-table-columns" tool returns all the columns for each table specified.


      - [looker-get-connection-tables](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-connection-tables/): A "looker-get-connection-tables" tool returns all the tables in a connection.


      - [looker-get-connections](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-connections/): A "looker-get-connections" tool returns all the connections in the source.


      - [looker-get-dashboards](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-dashboards/): "looker-get-dashboards" tool searches for a saved Dashboard by name or description.


      - [looker-get-dimensions](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-dimensions/): A "looker-get-dimensions" tool returns all the dimensions from a given explore in a given model in the source.


      - [looker-get-explores](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-explores/): A "looker-get-explores" tool returns all explores for the given model from the source.


      - [looker-get-filters](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-filters/): A "looker-get-filters" tool returns all the filters from a given explore in a given model in the source.


      - [looker-get-lookml-tests](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-lookml-tests/): Returns a list of tests which can be run to validate a project's LookML code and/or the underlying data, optionally filtered by the file id.


      - [looker-get-looks](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-looks/): "looker-get-looks" searches for saved Looks in a Looker source.


      - [looker-get-measures](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-measures/): A "looker-get-measures" tool returns all the measures from a given explore in a given model in the source.


      - [looker-get-models](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-models/): A "looker-get-models" tool returns all the models in the source.


      - [looker-get-parameters](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-parameters/): A "looker-get-parameters" tool returns all the parameters from a given explore in a given model in the source.


      - [looker-get-project-directories](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-project-directories/): A "looker-get-project-directories" tool returns the directories within a specific LookML project.


      - [looker-get-project-file](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-project-file/): A "looker-get-project-file" tool returns the contents of a LookML fle.


      - [looker-get-project-files](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-project-files/): A "looker-get-project-files" tool returns all the LookML fles in a project in the source.


      - [looker-get-projects](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-get-projects/): A "looker-get-projects" tool returns all the LookML projects in the source.


      - [looker-health-analyze](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-health-analyze/): "looker-health-analyze" provides a set of analytical commands for a Looker instance, allowing users to analyze projects, models, and explores.


      - [looker-health-pulse](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-health-pulse/): "looker-health-pulse" performs health checks on a Looker instance, with multiple actions available (e.g., checking database connections, dashboard performance, etc).


      - [looker-health-vacuum](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-health-vacuum/): "looker-health-vacuum" provides a set of commands to audit and identify unused LookML objects in a Looker instance.


      - [looker-make-dashboard](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-make-dashboard/): "looker-make-dashboard" generates a Looker dashboard in the users personal folder in Looker


      - [looker-make-look](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-make-look/): "looker-make-look" generates a Looker look in the users personal folder in Looker


      - [looker-query](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-query/): "looker-query" runs an inline query using the Looker semantic model.


      - [looker-query-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-query-sql/): "looker-query-sql" generates a sql query using the Looker semantic model.


      - [looker-query-url](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-query-url/): "looker-query-url" generates a url link to a Looker explore.


      - [looker-run-dashboard](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-run-dashboard/): "looker-run-dashboard" runs the queries associated with a dashboard.


      - [looker-run-look](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-run-look/): "looker-run-look" runs the query associated with a saved Look.


      - [looker-run-lookml-tests](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-run-lookml-tests/): This tool runs LookML tests in the project, filtered by file, test, and/or model.


      - [looker-update-project-file](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-update-project-file/): A "looker-update-project-file" tool updates the content of a LookML file in a project.


      - [looker-validate-project](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/looker/looker-validate-project/): A "looker-validate-project" tool checks the syntax of a LookML project and reports any errors


    - [MindsDB Tools](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mindsdb/): MindsDB tools that enable SQL queries across hundreds of datasources and ML models.


      - [mindsdb-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mindsdb/mindsdb-execute-sql/): A "mindsdb-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a MindsDB federated database.


      - [mindsdb-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mindsdb/mindsdb-sql/): A "mindsdb-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a MindsDB federated database.


    - [MongoDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/): Tools that work with the MongoDB Source.


      - [mongodb-aggregate](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-aggregate/): A "mongodb-aggregate" tool executes a multi-stage aggregation pipeline against a MongoDB collection.


      - [mongodb-delete-many](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-delete-many/): A "mongodb-delete-many" tool deletes all documents from a MongoDB collection that match a filter.


      - [mongodb-delete-one](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-delete-one/): A "mongodb-delete-one" tool deletes a single document from a MongoDB collection.


      - [mongodb-find](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-find/): A "mongodb-find" tool finds and retrieves documents from a MongoDB collection.


      - [mongodb-find-one](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-find-one/): A "mongodb-find-one" tool finds and retrieves a single document from a MongoDB collection.


      - [mongodb-insert-many](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-insert-many/): A "mongodb-insert-many" tool inserts multiple new documents into a MongoDB collection.


      - [mongodb-insert-one](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-insert-one/): A "mongodb-insert-one" tool inserts a single new document into a MongoDB collection.


      - [mongodb-update-many](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-update-many/): A "mongodb-update-many" tool updates all documents in a MongoDB collection that match a filter.


      - [mongodb-update-one](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mongodb/mongodb-update-one/): A "mongodb-update-one" tool updates a single document in a MongoDB collection.


    - [MySQL](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mysql/): Tools that work with MySQL Sources, such as Cloud SQL for MySQL.


      - [mysql-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mysql/mysql-execute-sql/): A "mysql-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a MySQL database.


      - [mysql-get-query-plan](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mysql/mysql-get-query-plan/): A "mysql-get-query-plan" tool gets the execution plan for a SQL statement against a MySQL database.


      - [mysql-list-active-queries](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mysql/mysql-list-active-queries/): A "mysql-list-active-queries" tool lists active queries in a MySQL database.


      - [mysql-list-table-fragmentation](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mysql/mysql-list-table-fragmentation/): A "mysql-list-table-fragmentation" tool lists top N fragemented tables in MySQL.


      - [mysql-list-tables](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mysql/mysql-list-tables/): The "mysql-list-tables" tool lists schema information for all or specified tables in a MySQL database.


      - [mysql-list-tables-missing-unique-indexes](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mysql/mysql-list-tables-missing-unique-indexes/): A "mysql-list-tables-missing-unique-indexes" tool lists tables that do not have primary or unique indices in a MySQL instance.


      - [mysql-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mysql/mysql-sql/): A "mysql-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a MySQL database.


    - [Neo4j](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/neo4j/): Tools that work with Neo4j Sources.


      - [neo4j-cypher](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/neo4j/neo4j-cypher/): A "neo4j-cypher" tool executes a pre-defined cypher statement against a Neo4j database.


      - [neo4j-execute-cypher](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/neo4j/neo4j-execute-cypher/): A "neo4j-execute-cypher" tool executes any arbitrary Cypher statement against a Neo4j database.


      - [neo4j-schema](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/neo4j/neo4j-schema/): A "neo4j-schema" tool extracts a comprehensive schema from a Neo4j database.


    - [OceanBase](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/oceanbase/): Tools that work with OceanBase Sources.


      - [oceanbase-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/oceanbase/oceanbase-execute-sql/): An "oceanbase-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against an OceanBase database.


      - [oceanbase-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/oceanbase/oceanbase-sql/): An "oceanbase-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against an OceanBase database.


    - [Oracle](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/oracle/): Tools that work with Oracle Sources.


      - [oracle-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/oracle/oracle-execute-sql/): An "oracle-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against an Oracle database.


      - [oracle-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/oracle/oracle-sql/): An "oracle-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against an Oracle database.


    - [Postgres](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/): Tools that work with Postgres Sources, such as Cloud SQL for Postgres and AlloyDB. 


      - [postgres-database-overview](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-database-overview/): The "postgres-database-overview" fetches the current state of the PostgreSQL server. 


      - [postgres-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-execute-sql/): A "postgres-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-get-column-cardinality](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-get-column-cardinality/): The "postgres-get-column-cardinality" tool estimates the number of unique values in one or all columns of a Postgres database table.


      - [postgres-list-active-queries](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-active-queries/): The "postgres-list-active-queries" tool lists currently active queries in a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-available-extensions](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-available-extensions/): The "postgres-list-available-extensions" tool retrieves all PostgreSQL extensions available for installation on a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-database-stats](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-database-stats/): The "postgres-list-database-stats" tool lists lists key performance and activity statistics of PostgreSQL databases.


      - [postgres-list-indexes](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-indexes/): The "postgres-list-indexes" tool lists indexes in a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-installed-extensions](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-installed-extensions/): The "postgres-list-installed-extensions" tool retrieves all PostgreSQL extensions installed on a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-locks](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-locks/): The "postgres-list-locks" tool lists active locks in the database, including the associated process, lock type, relation, mode, and the query holding or waiting on the lock.


      - [postgres-list-pg-settings](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-pg-settings/): The "postgres-list-pg-settings" tool lists PostgreSQL run-time configuration settings.


      - [postgres-list-publication-tables](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-publication-tables/): The "postgres-list-publication-tables" tool lists publication tables in a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-query-stats](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-query-stats/): The "postgres-list-query-stats" tool lists query statistics from a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-roles](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-roles/): The "postgres-list-roles" tool lists user-created roles in a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-schemas](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-schemas/): The "postgres-list-schemas" tool lists user-defined schemas in a database.


      - [postgres-list-sequences](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-sequences/): The "postgres-list-sequences" tool lists sequences in a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-stored-procedure](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-stored-procedure/): The "postgres-list-stored-procedure" tool retrieves metadata for stored procedures in PostgreSQL, including procedure definitions, owners, languages, and descriptions.


      - [postgres-list-table-stats](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-table-stats/): The "postgres-list-table-stats" tool reports table statistics including size, scan metrics, and bloat indicators for PostgreSQL tables.


      - [postgres-list-tables](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-tables/): The "postgres-list-tables" tool lists schema information for all or specified tables in a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-tablespaces](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-tablespaces/): The "postgres-list-tablespaces" tool lists tablespaces in a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-triggers](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-triggers/): The "postgres-list-triggers" tool lists triggers in a Postgres database.


      - [postgres-list-views](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-list-views/): The "postgres-list-views" tool lists views in a Postgres database, with a default limit of 50 rows.


      - [postgres-long-running-transactions](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-long-running-transactions/): The postgres-long-running-transactions tool Identifies and lists database transactions that exceed a specified time limit. For each of the long running transactions, the output contains the process id, database name, user name, application name, client address, state, connection age, transaction age, query age, last activity age, wait event type, wait event, and query string.


      - [postgres-replication-stats](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-replication-stats/): The "postgres-replication-stats" tool reports replication-related metrics for WAL streaming replicas, including lag sizes presented in human-readable form.


      - [postgres-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/postgres/postgres-sql/): A "postgres-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a Postgres database.


    - [Redis](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/redis/): Tools that work with Redis Sources.


      - [redis](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/redis/redis/): A "redis" tool executes a set of pre-defined Redis commands against a Redis instance.


    - [Serverless for Apache Spark](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/serverless-spark/): Tools that work with Google Cloud Serverless for Apache Spark Sources.


      - [serverless-spark-get-batch](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/serverless-spark/serverless-spark-get-batch/): A "serverless-spark-get-batch" tool gets a single Spark batch from the source.


      - [serverless-spark-get-session](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/serverless-spark/serverless-spark-get-session/): A "serverless-spark-get-session" tool retrieves a specific Spark session from the source.


      - [serverless-spark-list-batches](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/serverless-spark/serverless-spark-list-batches/): A "serverless-spark-list-batches" tool returns a list of Spark batches from the source.


      - [serverless-spark-list-sessions](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/serverless-spark/serverless-spark-list-sessions/): A "serverless-spark-list-sessions" tool returns a list of Spark sessions from the source.


      - [serverless-spark-cancel-batch](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/serverless-spark/serverless-spark-cancel-batch/): A "serverless-spark-cancel-batch" tool cancels a running Spark batch operation.


      - [serverless-spark-create-pyspark-batch](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/serverless-spark/serverless-spark-create-pyspark-batch/): A "serverless-spark-create-pyspark-batch" tool submits a Spark batch to run asynchronously.


      - [serverless-spark-create-spark-batch](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/serverless-spark/serverless-spark-create-spark-batch/): A "serverless-spark-create-spark-batch" tool submits a Spark batch to run asynchronously.


    - [SingleStore](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/singlestore/): Tools that work with SingleStore Sources


      - [singlestore-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/singlestore/singlestore-execute-sql/): A "singlestore-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a SingleStore database.


      - [singlestore-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/singlestore/singlestore-sql/): A "singlestore-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a SingleStore database.


    - [Snowflake](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/snowflake/): Tools that work with Snowflake Sources.


      - [snowflake-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/snowflake/snowflake-execute-sql/): A "snowflake-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a Snowflake database.


      - [snowflake-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/snowflake/snowflake-sql/): A "snowflake-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a  Snowflake database.


    - [Spanner](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/spanner/): Tools that work with Spanner Sources.


      - [spanner-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/spanner/spanner-execute-sql/): A "spanner-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a Spanner database.


      - [spanner-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/spanner/spanner-sql/): A "spanner-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a Google Cloud Spanner database.


      - [spanner-list-graphs](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/spanner/spanner-list-graphs/): A "spanner-list-graphs" tool retrieves schema information about graphs in a Google Cloud Spanner database.


      - [spanner-list-tables](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/spanner/spanner-list-tables/): A "spanner-list-tables" tool retrieves schema information about tables in a Google Cloud Spanner database.


    - [SQL Server](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mssql/): Tools that work with SQL Server Sources, such as CloudSQL for SQL Server.


      - [mssql-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mssql/mssql-execute-sql/): A "mssql-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a SQL Server database.


      - [mssql-list-tables](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mssql/mssql-list-tables/): The "mssql-list-tables" tool lists schema information for all or specified tables in a SQL server database.


      - [mssql-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/mssql/mssql-sql/): A "mssql-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a SQL Server database.


    - [SQLite](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/sqlite/): Tools that work with SQLite Sources.


      - [sqlite-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/sqlite/sqlite-execute-sql/): A "sqlite-execute-sql" tool executes a single SQL statement against a SQLite database.


      - [sqlite-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/sqlite/sqlite-sql/): Execute SQL statements against a SQLite database.


    - [TiDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/tidb/): Tools that work with TiDB Sources, such as TiDB Cloud and self-hosted TiDB.


      - [tidb-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/tidb/tidb-execute-sql/): A "tidb-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a TiDB database.


      - [tidb-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/tidb/tidb-sql/): A "tidb-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a TiDB database.


    - [Trino](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/trino/): Tools that work with Trino Sources, such as distributed SQL query engine.


      - [trino-execute-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/trino/trino-execute-sql/): A "trino-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a Trino database.


      - [trino-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/trino/trino-sql/): A "trino-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a Trino database.


    - [Utility tools](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/utility/): Tools that provide utility.


      - [wait](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/utility/wait/): A "wait" tool pauses execution for a specified duration.


    - [Valkey](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/valkey/): Tools that work with Valkey Sources.


      - [valkey](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/valkey/valkey/): A "valkey" tool executes a set of pre-defined Valkey commands against a Valkey instance.


    - [YugabyteDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/yuagbytedb/): Tools that work with Valkey Sources.


      - [yugabytedb-sql](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/tools/yuagbytedb/yugabytedb-sql/): A "yugabytedb-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a YugabyteDB database.


  - [Prompts](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/prompts/): Prompts allow servers to provide structured messages and instructions for interacting with language models.


    - [Custom](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/resources/prompts/custom/): Custom prompts defined by the user.

- [Samples](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/): Samples and guides for using Toolbox.


  - [AlloyDB](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/alloydb/): How to get started with Toolbox using AlloyDB.


    - [Quickstart (MCP with AlloyDB)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/alloydb/mcp_quickstart/): How to get started running Toolbox with MCP Inspector and AlloyDB as the source.


    - [Getting started with alloydb-ai-nl tool](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/alloydb/ai-nl/): An end to end tutorial for building an ADK agent using the AlloyDB AI NL tool.


  - [BigQuery](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/bigquery/): How to get started with Toolbox using BigQuery.


    - [Quickstart (Local with BigQuery)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/bigquery/local_quickstart/): How to get started running Toolbox locally with Python, BigQuery, and LangGraph, LlamaIndex, or ADK.


    - [Quickstart (MCP with BigQuery)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/bigquery/mcp_quickstart/): How to get started running Toolbox with MCP Inspector and BigQuery as the source.


  - [Looker](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/looker/): How to get started with Toolbox using Looker.


    - [Gemini-CLI and OAuth](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/looker/looker_gemini_oauth/): How to connect to Looker from Gemini-CLI with end-user credentials


    - [Quickstart (MCP with Looker and Gemini-CLI)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/looker/looker_gemini/): How to get started running Toolbox with Gemini-CLI and Looker as the source.


    - [Quickstart (MCP with Looker)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/looker/looker_mcp_inspector/): How to get started running Toolbox with MCP Inspector and Looker as the source.


  - [Neo4j](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/neo4j/): How to get started with Toolbox using Neo4j.


    - [Quickstart (MCP with Neo4j)](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/neo4j/mcp_quickstart/): How to get started running Toolbox with MCP Inspector and Neo4j as the source.


  - [Pre- and Post- Processing](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/pre_post_processing/): Intercept and modify interactions between the agent and its tools either before or after a tool is executed.


    - [Python](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/pre_post_processing/python/): How to add pre- and post- processing to your Agents using Python.


    - [Javascript](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/pre_post_processing/js/): How to add pre- and post- processing to your Agents using JS.


    - [Go](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/pre_post_processing/go/): How to add pre- and post- processing to your Agents using Go.


  - [Snowflake](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/samples/snowflake/): How to get started running Toolbox with MCP Inspector and Snowflake as the source.

- [About](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/about/): A list of other information related to MCP Toolbox.


  - [FAQ](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/about/faq/): Frequently asked questions about Toolbox.
- [SDKs](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/): Client SDKs to connect to the MCP Toolbox server.


  - [Python](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/python-sdk/): Python SDKs to connect to the MCP Toolbox server.


    - [ADK](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/python-sdk/adk/): MCP Toolbox SDK for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your ADK apps.


    - [Core](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/python-sdk/core/): MCP Toolbox Core SDK for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your Agentic apps.


    - [LangChain/LangGraph](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/python-sdk/langchain/): MCP Toolbox SDK for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your LangChain/LangGraph apps.


    - [LlamaIndex](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/python-sdk/llamaindex/): MCP Toolbox LlamaIndex SDK for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your LlamaIndex apps.


  - [Javascript](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/js-sdk/): Javascript SDKs to connect to the MCP Toolbox server.


    - [ADK](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/js-sdk/adk/): MCP Toolbox SDK for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your ADK apps.


    - [Core](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/js-sdk/core/): MCP Toolbox Core SDK for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your Agentic apps.


  - [Go](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/go-sdk/): Go SDKs to connect to the MCP Toolbox server.


    - [ADK Package](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/go-sdk/tbadk/): MCP Toolbox ADK for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your Agentic apps.


    - [Core Package](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/go-sdk/core/): MCP Toolbox Core SDK for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your Agentic apps.


    - [Genkit Package](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/sdks/go-sdk/tbgenkit/): MCP Toolbox Genkit for integrating functionalities of MCP Toolbox into your Agentic apps.

- [Reference](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/reference/): This section contains reference documentation.


  - [CLI](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/reference/cli/): This page describes the `toolbox` command-line options.


  - [Prebuilt Tools](https://dishaprakash.github.io/genai-toolbox/dev/reference/prebuilt-tools/): This page lists all the prebuilt tools available.
